customSkills.name: Summarize Content
customSkills.description: Creates a concise summary of the provided text while preserving key points and intent.

output.description: A concise summary of the input text.

customSkills.name: Translate Text
customSkills.description: Translates text from one language to another while preserving meaning and tone.

inputs.name: targetLanguage
inputs.description: The language to translate the text into.

customSkills.name: Extract Keywords
customSkills.description: Identifies the most important keywords and phrases from the provided content.

inputs.name: maxKeywords
inputs.description: Maximum number of keywords to return.
